other_observers: None; I am the original finder
specific_location: County Road 177.9 , 1/4 mile south of Clark Hill bend , above Reed Canyon.
description: Large about AMGO size , tanager shape and jizz , basically red-orange all over with dusky gray auriculars and grayish upper back , no wing bars , stout dark gray bill ,dark lores.Behaviors: Moving about every 5 minutes or so singing from higher Pondorosa Pines above PJ . Came in immeadiately when I played back the song.Call: Song was sweeter tha other tanagers with little hoarseness and quite similar to Black-headed Grosbeak . Call note however was a single note chup nothing like the call notes of the other likely tanagers or BHGR .Plumage: adult
